--- Thread (32 messages, 2018-03-20) ---
[2018-03-20 21:16] .bky_1556 (bky): Whelp, there's your answer. Attacking is better than buying drones 😉
[2018-03-20 21:17] liadahlia (Lia): Yeah but with botches you can attack *and* buy drones
[2018-03-20 21:17] liadahlia (Lia): All i'm saying is botches are better
[2018-03-20 21:17] f300xen (f0x): i mean botches are good, so you should buy them
[2018-03-20 21:18] supergreyman (Greyman): Surprising to see how mrguy888 thinks Grimbotch is a bit weaker than Electrovore.
[2018-03-20 21:18] liadahlia (Lia): He probably meant it in a different sense
[2018-03-20 21:18] liadahlia (Lia): Like, early game vores are better than botches
[2018-03-20 21:19] liadahlia (Lia): Because if need be, you can keep attacking with them forever
[2018-03-20 21:19] .bky_1556 (bky): On the one hand, 'botches let you get a bit higher economy.
[2018-03-20 21:19] .bky_1556 (bky): On the other hand, 'botches require you to get a bit higher economy.
[2018-03-20 21:20] .bky_1556 (bky): Only if you want to replace the botches as they expre.
[2018-03-20 21:20] .bky_1556 (bky): In practice if they're both available I usually end up mixing.
[2018-03-20 21:21] .bky_1556 (bky): Convenience trumps slight changes in efficiency.
[2018-03-20 21:21] liadahlia (Lia): I think generally botches are better in the late game than vores
[2018-03-20 21:23] .bky_1556 (bky): Botches are good peak attackers because they're cheap and buying them with the intent of soaking with them avoids their drawback.
[2018-03-20 21:24] .bky_1556 (bky): Botches are also pretty good right as you're breaking the absorb barrier, simply because any quick cheap attacker that isn't horribly inefficient is good there.
[2018-03-20 21:24] .bky_1556 (bky): They're pretty bad before the absorb barrier, because of lifespan.
[2018-03-20 21:24] .bky_1556 (bky): They're not terribly good during buildup because they'll need to be replaced as attackers later.
[2018-03-20 21:25] .bky_1556 (bky): But given their short term efficiency, it's still fine to get a *few* during buildup.
[2018-03-20 21:26] .bky_1556 (bky): Aside from convenience factors around the absorb barrier, you generally want to avoid the situation where you have a bunch of 'botches expiring at the same time and holding them all lets your opponent deny absorb.
[2018-03-20 21:27] .bky_1556 (bky): That's a reason why Grimbotch+EvE is often better than 2x Grimbotch the turn after you break the absorb barrier.
[2018-03-20 21:28] .bky_1556 (bky): Even without 'vores, look for good opportunities to Grimbotch+Tarsier over 2x Grimbotch in places that make your opponent's defense awkward.
[2018-03-20 21:30] .bky_1556 (bky): Anyway, we're off topic, Volt Tower is weak just as much because of the tech cost in the click ability, as the huge price in extra engineers..
[2018-03-20 21:37] .bky_1556 (bky): GGB is worth about 1.5 :Attack: , clicking a 10 :Blue: :Blue: unit should give about 1.8 :Attack: , marshaling three engineers should be worth 1 :Attack: on top of the main unit.
[2018-03-20 21:38] .bky_1556 (bky): So the latest version of Volt Tower is only a little on the clunky side of reasonable with three engineers.
[2018-03-20 21:39] .bky_1556 (bky): (bulk discounts mean the package should be cheaper)
[2018-03-20 21:40] .bky_1556 (bky): BUT, once you have that, more engineers have about 7-Tarsier Amporilla efficiency!
[2018-03-20 21:40] .bky_1556 (bky): In much easier chunks!
[2018-03-20 21:41] .bky_1556 (bky): 16BB vs. 17RRRR for 4 attack and the possibility to cheaply obtain more... It's like a blue super Lucina.
[2018-03-20 21:42] .bky_1556 (bky): It even eats some of its own over tech!
[2018-03-20 21:42] .bky_1556 (bky): ...oh wait I forgot to include the conduits.
[2018-03-20 21:42] .bky_1556 (bky): Anyways, it gets very sharp.

[2018-03-20 22:34] http404error: To be clear, click order can make new actions possible but it won't change the degree of the outcome if you can achieve the same outcome with a different click order.
[2018-03-20 22:35] http404error: Auride Core is a good example of this principle
[2018-03-20 22:37] supergreyman (Greyman): There were a few instances where I was trying to figure out how to bring down a Gauss Cannon to exactly 3HP before sniping it with Apollo. The way you click to assign attack when breaching is important in this case.
[2018-03-20 22:38] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): (AB = C -> BA = C) v (AB != BA)?
[2018-03-20 22:39] supergreyman (Greyman): @StrShPlyr Sorry, can't understand what you're trying to say.
[2018-03-20 22:41] supergreyman (Greyman): I can understand 404's post, but not yours.
[2018-03-20 22:42] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): The same basic statement in Logic.
[2018-03-20 22:50] liadahlia (Lia): Truth functional logic?
[2018-03-20 22:50] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): Yes, but may be inexact.
[2018-03-20 22:50] liadahlia (Lia): TFL doesn't use '=' though
[2018-03-20 22:54] liadahlia (Lia): And 'A' and 'B' are individual actions?
[2018-03-20 22:55] liadahlia (Lia): Can you put those statements in parentheses?
[2018-03-20 22:55] liadahlia (Lia): I'm having trouble understanding the scope of each operators
[2018-03-20 22:56] liadahlia (Lia): AB = C implies BA = C?
[2018-03-20 22:56] liadahlia (Lia): Or is it AB is C -> BA
[2018-03-20 22:58] liadahlia (Lia): Is 'v' logical or here?
[2018-03-20 22:58] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): Offtopic. -> Imply. (Thing = Thing.) Or v.
[2018-03-20 22:59] liadahlia (Lia): That's not what -> is though
[2018-03-20 22:59] http404error: I would say this syntax talk is starting to drift out of scope.
[2018-03-20 22:59] liadahlia (Lia): Oh no I see what you mean
[2018-03-20 23:00] http404error: We already have notation that covers Prismata sufficiently and is agreed upon by consensus
[2018-03-20 23:00] http404error: Bandwagoning retroactively earns you no points.
[2018-03-20 23:06] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): Tornado: 1. 15:Gold: 4:Energy:. :Health:1. Click: :Lifespan:, pay all :Gold:, :Energy:, :Green:, :Blue:, :Red:, get :Attack: for every 2.
[2018-03-20 23:07] wilson0862 (Wilson): That's an oppressive amount of threat.
[2018-03-20 23:08] .bky_1556 (bky): It's not terribly efficient, though?
[2018-03-20 23:09] .bky_1556 (bky): If you're only spending G B and $, it's Gauss Charges and Pixies.
[2018-03-20 23:09] f300xen (f0x): you can hold it forever
[2018-03-20 23:09] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): Tornado (1.1): 1. 15:Gold: 4:Energy:. :Health:1. :Time:2. :Lifespan:5. Click: :Lifespan:, pay all :Energy:, :Green:, :Blue:, :Red:, get :Attack: for every 2.
[2018-03-20 23:09] .bky_1556 (bky): The EEEE you'll have from buying it is 2 pixies.
[2018-03-20 23:10] wilson0862 (Wilson): It is build time 0 pixies and gauss charges.
[2018-03-20 23:10] http404error: I think it threatens breaches in maybe the most fun way that is possible
[2018-03-20 23:11] http404error: You might think about Wincer and Antima as a bit different because they telegraph themselves so hard
[2018-03-20 23:11] http404error: Frostbites do too, of course, but they hold a lot better
[2018-03-20 23:12] http404error: Antima is one of the cooler big bursts in the game and it does so without being overly rulesy
[2018-03-20 23:13] http404error: I would encourage prospective designers looking to follow in its footsteps to try to distinguish their designs from it significantly though
[2018-03-20 23:13] http404error: Having two units that play the same role isn't that interesting
[2018-03-20 23:22] http404error: (unless they do it in interestingly different ways!)

[2018-03-22 21:17] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): Coconut: 8:Gold: 2:Green: :Blue:. 3:Health: 4:Fragile:. :Prompt::Blocker:.
Click: :Lifespan:, Put 4:Attack: on a :Blocker:.
[2018-03-22 21:17] f300xen (f0x): that's terrible flavor
[2018-03-22 21:17] f300xen (f0x): unless the coconut is secretly a giant bomb
[2018-03-22 21:20] kaelii: Health AND fragile? Does it like, take fragile damage and then has 3 health?
[2018-03-22 21:21] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): The other way around.
[2018-03-22 21:22] kaelii: ???? So if I do... 3 damage what happens?
[2018-03-22 21:23] themightyflango (non alpha pleb): but 2 health can be absorbed
[2018-03-22 21:23] themightyflango (non alpha pleb): I don't necessarily get the click
[2018-03-22 21:23] kaelii: I think the click is "Deal 4 to a specific blocker"
[2018-03-22 21:23] themightyflango (non alpha pleb): so you're dealing 4 :Attack:  to a defender, or you're giving one of your defenders 4 :Attack:
[2018-03-22 21:23] themightyflango (non alpha pleb): yeah, the former sounds cooler
[2018-03-22 21:24] f300xen (f0x): so 6 soak and 3 attack for 8GGB
[2018-03-22 21:24] kaelii: I mean, still really good for sniping their odin
[2018-03-22 21:26] liadahlia (Lia): Wtf you get to choose your attack?
[2018-03-22 21:27] liadahlia (Lia): Something like that is kinda degenerate
[2018-03-22 21:27] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): Coconut (1.1): 4. 10:Gold: 2:Green: :Blue:. 3:Health: 4:Fragile:. :Prompt::Blocker:.
Click: If :Health: is kept, :Lifespan:, get 5:Attack:.
[2018-03-22 21:28] liadahlia (Lia): I kinda like the idea of mixed health
[2018-03-22 21:28] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): Let's keep it to only 1 new mechanic per unit, please.
[2018-03-22 21:28] liadahlia (Lia): But I hate being able to assign damage like that
[2018-03-22 21:28] liadahlia (Lia): That's very degenerate
[2018-03-22 21:28] .bky_1556 (bky): Coconut seems like an SDR violation.
[2018-03-22 21:29] .bky_1556 (bky): You would rather your blocking Odin be not-blocking.
[2018-03-22 21:29] f300xen (f0x): i mean the solution is to not buy odin
[2018-03-22 21:29] liadahlia (Lia): Apollo is mildly degenerate as a unit already
[2018-03-22 21:30] liadahlia (Lia): And it only deals 3 damage
[2018-03-22 21:30] f300xen (f0x): lucina is great in apollo sets
[2018-03-22 21:30] liadahlia (Lia): But yeah it does violate SDR because opponent don't wanna break the fragile
[2018-03-22 21:30] liadahlia (Lia): Is the SDR contest still going on?
[2018-03-22 21:31] http404error: Thankfully that one's over
[2018-03-22 21:31] liadahlia (Lia): I don't think it breaks SDR in a good way
[2018-03-22 21:31] http404error: Current challenge is "Green unit with stamina"
[2018-03-22 21:32] http404error: I would highly encourage you all to contribute designs
[2018-03-22 21:32] http404error: It's a lot more fun to make your own stuff than to just critique all the time
[2018-03-22 21:32] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): Since it can't attack if Damaged.
[2018-03-22 21:32] http404error: I would know, I used to be that kind of lurker who would just try to help others
[2018-03-22 21:32] liadahlia (Lia): I like critiquing more :P
[2018-03-22 21:32] http404error: Okay, giving feedback is a lot of fun
[2018-03-22 21:32] http404error: But you'll become a better designer by giving it a shot yourself
[2018-03-22 21:33] http404error: It also helps you sympathize with how hard it is!
[2018-03-22 21:33] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): What does "if :Health: is kept" mean?
[2018-03-22 21:33] liadahlia (Lia): I like seeing these cool ideos
[2018-03-22 21:33] liadahlia (Lia): I don't necessarily want to do it myself tho
[2018-03-22 21:33] http404error: Fair enough. Feel free to drag in designs from the reddit thread for discussion too!
[2018-03-22 21:33] liadahlia (Lia): It's like I can enjoy a movie but I don't really want to make one :P
[2018-03-22 21:34] http404error: I'll give an example
[2018-03-22 21:34] http404error: Oops, I ran out of free time at work, darn it
[2018-03-22 21:34] http404error: I use a plugin that restricts how much time I spend on Reddit
[2018-03-22 21:34] liadahlia (Lia): But not on discord tho :Lul:
[2018-03-22 21:34] http404error: ...I turned it off for Discord yesterday
[2018-03-22 21:35] http404error: I was doing something important
